base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of haggar_moveset — a character (playable) from 1989 final fight. Mike Haggar — Metro City Mayor + pro-wrestler. Piledriver + spinning-clothesline-special + powerbomb + suplex. Slow but strong. 1229×966 largest playable sheet. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
